text:
ports-category: japanese

Here is a update patch for japanese/tk80.
tk8.0.5jp1.5 to tk8.0.5jp1.5fix1.

This patch fixes some serious bugs include some core dump probrems.

Fix: please commit following patch.
I've tested under my 3.1-RELEASE box and 4.0-current one.
make install/deinstall seems work fine.
